name: Foxx Development Holdings Inc.
business: Foxx Development Holdings Inc. sells Foxx-branded tablets, smartphones, wearables, and other communication terminals. Its customers are primarily distributors who sell to major carriers such as T-Mobile, AT&T, and Verizon, as well as E-Commerce customers on platforms like TikTok Shop.

exposures.sentence: We currently offer a range of Foxx-branded products, including tablets, smartphones, wearables, and expect to launch other high-quality communication terminals.
We also began E-Commerce operations in March 2024 and our E-Commerce customers include customers from the TikTok Shop.
We are building a portfolio of IoT modules, including 4G LTE Cat 1 bis, Cat 4, Cat M, NB-IoT, 5G, 5G Redcap, 5G AI, Bluetooth, and Wi-Fi modules.
In July 2025, we successfully launched our first product Leak Shield, a smart water leak detector we developed through our strategic technology partnership with APEC Water Systems.
IoT data management & analytics using artificial intelligence (AI) or machine learning (ML) algorithms.
Data security, firewall, cyberattack alert and prevention, data backup.

catalysts.event: Launch of second generation smartwatches for kids
catalysts.sentence: The launch date for the second generation smartwatches for kids is in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of solar-powered 4G LTE outdoor security camera
catalysts.sentence: In the Home Security category, we have been developing a solar-powered 4G LTE outdoor security camera and plan to launch this product in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of 4G LTE outdoor security camera
catalysts.sentence: Our 4G LTE outdoor security camera is expected to launch in the market in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025.
Our 4G LTE dashcam is expected to be launched in the market in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of 4G LTE jump starter and tracker
catalysts.sentence: Both products are expected to be launched in the fourth calendar quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of 5G modules, 5G Redcap modules, and 5G AI modules
catalysts.sentence: We have started to develop 5G modules, 5G Redcap modules, and 5G AI modules, which may potentially launch in the first half of 2026.
